description: You are a BIM Quality Manager conducting a pre-handover audit of the FZK-Haus residential model. A validation report has been placed at /home/ga/Desktop/validation_report.txt listing critical schema errors that must be corrected. The model is pre-loaded in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Read the validation report carefully and fix ALL listed issues: (1) The IfcSite is missing its geographic coordinates - add the RefLatitude and RefLongitude specified in the report, (2) The IfcBuilding is missing a BuildingAddress - add the postal address from the report, (3) All IfcSpace elements have been erroneously renamed to 'Room' - restore unique names as listed in the report, (4) All IfcWall elements have been erroneously renamed to 'Wall' - restore unique names as listed in the report. Save the corrected model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_remediated.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65. site(25)+address(25) = 50 insufficient. Must fix spaces or walls to pass. Anti-pattern: do-nothing cannot satisfy absence criteria.
